days.title: Arrival in Paris
days.subtitle: Welcome to the City of Light

timeline.title: Arrive at Gare de Lyon
timeline.detail: You arrive at Gare de Lyon via a direct train from CDG. Follow signs for the RER and Metro to reach your hotel.

timeline.title: Check in to Hotel Le 123 Sébastopol
timeline.detail: Settle into your boutique hotel located in the vibrant 2nd arrondissement, just a 10-minute walk from the central attractions.

timeline.title: Lunch at Café de Flore
timeline.detail: Savor a classic French lunch at this historic café, known for its rich culinary history and iconic customers.

timeline.title: Explore the Louvre
timeline.detail: Visit the world-famous Louvre Museum. Ensure to pre-book your tickets online to avoid long queues and admire masterpieces like the Mona Lisa.

timeline.title: Stroll along the Seine River
timeline.detail: Take a leisurely walk along the Seine, enjoying views of historic bridges and the Notre Dame Cathedral.

timeline.title: Dinner at Le Procope
timeline.detail: Dine at Paris' oldest café, known for its traditional French cuisine. Highly recommended are the coq au vin and crème brûlée.

localTips: Pre-book Louvre tickets at louvre.fr for faster entry.
Consider getting a Navigo Day Pass for unlimited travel on public transport.
Try to learn a few basic French phrases; it’s appreciated by locals.

days.title: Exploring Montmartre and the Eiffel Tower
days.subtitle: Art, culture, and breathtaking views

timeline.title: Breakfast at Angelina
timeline.detail: Start your day with a delicious breakfast at this elegant café famous for its hot chocolate and pastries.

timeline.title: Visit Sacré-Cœur Basilica
timeline.detail: Climb to the top of Montmartre to visit this stunning basilica, offering panoramic views of Paris and remarkable architecture.

timeline.title: Explore Montmartre
timeline.detail: Wander the charming streets of Montmartre, visiting local shops and artists at work, along with the iconic Moulin Rouge.

timeline.title: Lunch at La Maison Rose
timeline.detail: Enjoy lunch in this picturesque restaurant with a romantic atmosphere. Try their rotisserie chicken and seasonal vegetables.

timeline.title: Eiffel Tower Visit
timeline.detail: Pre-book your Eiffel Tower tickets online to avoid the long wait. Take in the stunning views from the top.

timeline.title: Dinner at Les Ombres
timeline.detail: Dine at this rooftop restaurant with breathtaking views of the Eiffel Tower, offering French gastronomy at its finest.

localTips: Book Eiffel Tower tickets at toureiffel.paris for a specific time slot.
Try to visit Montmartre early in the day to avoid crowds.
Check for live music events at local venues in the area.

days.title: Cultural Immersion and Departure
days.subtitle: Final day of exploration

timeline.title: Breakfast at Le Pain Quotidien
timeline.detail: Enjoy organic pastries and fresh coffee at this cozy spot before starting your day.

timeline.title: Palace of Versailles Visit
timeline.detail: Take a RER train to Versailles to explore the opulent palace and gardens. Book tickets in advance for access to the estate.

timeline.title: Lunch at La Petite Venise
timeline.detail: Have lunch in the gardens of Versailles, offering a range of classic French dishes and a lovely view.

timeline.title: Return to Paris
timeline.detail: Travel back to Paris by RER. Ensure you have your ticket ready for a smooth journey.

timeline.title: Last-minute Shopping at Champs-Élysées
timeline.detail: Enjoy some shopping at the famous Champs-Élysées, where you can find everything from high-end brands to delightful souvenirs.

timeline.title: Departure from Gare de Lyon
timeline.detail: Head to Gare de Lyon for your evening train back home, reflecting on your memorable Parisian adventure.

localTips: Buy your RER train tickets to Versailles in advance to avoid queues.
Try local street food such as crepes while exploring.
Be aware of pickpockets in crowded tourist areas.

hotels.name: Hotel Le 123 Sébastopol
hotels.note: 10-min walk from Gare de Lyon, boutique hotel

budget.note: A delicious meal in a historic café
Access to the palace and gardens
Navigo Day Pass for unlimited travel
Indulge in fine pastries and coffee

urgent.label: Book Louvre and Eiffel Tower tickets
urgent.note: To avoid long waits, book ASAP

urgent.label: Reserve Versailles tickets
urgent.note: Sells out quickly; ensure to book online
